title: Merch or premium products (UNION)
prompt: Using UNION, return the names of products that are either in the "Merch" category or priced over 100 (or both — no duplicates). Single column name, alphabetical.

generic: SELECT name FROM products WHERE category = 'Merch'
SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > 100

hints: UNION combines both result sets and removes duplicates (UNION ALL would keep them).
One query for Merch products, one for price > 100.
